goalInstr.answer: answers customer questions accurately from your knowledge base.
goalInstr.leads: captures and qualifies leads before handing them to your team.
goalInstr.handoff: routes customers to your team the moment a human is needed.
goalInstr.all: answers questions, captures leads, and routes to your team.

stepSub.pagesFound: {count, plural, one {# page found} other {# pages found}}

importedLine.pages: {count, plural, one {# page} other {# pages}} from your website
importedLine.addedSources: · {count, plural, one {# added source} other {# added sources}}

extract.buildingAgentFor: FrontFace is building your agent for

success.title: Your agent is live
success.subtitle: {agentName} is trained and ready to answer customers, capture leads, and hand off to your team.

nextItems.widget: Add the chat widget to your site

welcome.title: Welcome to FrontFace
welcome.sub: Your AI support agent learns your product and answers customers in seconds — capturing leads and handing off to your team when it counts.

checklist.team: Tell us a little about your team
checklist.train: Train your agent on your website & docs
checklist.watch: Watch it answer a real question — live

hear.title: How did you hear about us?
hear.sub: Helps us know what's working — pick whatever fits best.

size.title: What's your company size?
size.sub: We'll tune defaults — volume, seats, and lead routing — to match.

goal.title: What should your agent do first?
goal.sub: You can turn on every capability later — this just sets the focus.

name.title: Name your agent
name.sub: This is who your customers will be chatting with. You can rename it anytime.

train.title: Train your agent
train.sub: Point us at your site and we'll read every page. Add files, text, or Q&A to fill any gaps.
train.crawlHint: We'll crawl pages on this domain to train your agent.

leads.title: Capture & qualify leads
leads.desc: Collect details and screen intent before handoff.

handoff.title: Route to my team
handoff.desc: Hand warm conversations to a human, seamlessly.

all.title: All of the above
all.desc: One agent that answers, captures, and routes.

tonePreview.friendly: Hi there! I'm here to help with anything {company}.
tonePreview.professional: Hello — I'm the {company} assistant. How can I help you today?
tonePreview.playful: Hey! Ask me anything about {company} — I've read every page.

drawerSub.file: Upload a document to train your agent.
drawerSub.text: Add plain text — notes, policies, FAQs.
drawerSub.qa: Craft a question and the answer to give.

train.fileHint: PDF or TXT · up to 10 MB
train.contentPlaceholder: Paste any text your agent should know…
train.questionPlaceholder: e.g. Do you offer a free trial?
train.answerPlaceholder: The answer your agent should give

nourishco.quote: Setup took an afternoon. It reads our menu and nutrition pages and just knows the answers — and quietly captures leads while it's at it.

sources.title: Answers from your knowledge base
sources.desc: Trained on your site, docs and FAQs — accurate replies, every time.

users.title: Captures & qualifies leads
users.desc: Collects details and intent, then routes the warm ones to you.

handoff.title: Human handoff, built in
handoff.desc: Escalates to your team the moment a person is needed.

bolt.title: Live in minutes
bolt.desc: Point it at your website and it's ready to answer.

tour.welcomeBody: Welcome to FrontFace! After this quick 2-minute setup, you can manage your chatbot entirely from your IDE.
tour.apiKeyBody: Create an API key to connect AI tools like Cursor or Claude Code. This is the only manual step — everything else happens in your IDE.
tour.mcpConfigBody: This configuration tells your AI tool how to connect to FrontFace. Copy it — you'll paste it into your IDE settings next.
tour.doneBody: Paste this config into your IDE's MCP settings. From now on, just ask your AI:
tour.doneExample: “Add FAQ about shipping to my chatbot”
